sections_cited: sections 3 and 4 of the Illegal Dispossession Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Rev. Application No. 268 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case. 07-03-2023 Mr. Ghulam Muhammad Dars, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Usman Ali Hadi, Advocate a/w Shahrukh Khan for respondent Nos.1 & 2. Mr. Talib Ali Memon, A.P.G. ============= Omar Sial, J: This is an application filed by Javed Masood Khan impugning an order dated 14.11.2022 passed by the learned 4th Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi East. In terms of the said order the learned court declined to take cognizance of a complaint filed under sections 3 and 4 of the Illegal Dispossession Act, 2005. 2. I have heard the counsels for both the parties as well as the learned APG. With their able assistance I have also gone through the material on record as well as the order impugned. 3. I am inclined to agree with the findings and observations of the learned trial court made in the second paragraph of page 4 of the impugned order. The application stands dismissed. JUDGE
